description: habeebs-skill hooks (5 registrations): SessionStart x2 — ghost-commit detection + cross-session peer-scan (warn-only); PreToolUse on Bash — block commits/pushes to the default branch; PreToolUse on Edit|Write|NotebookEdit — peer-overlap annotation (warn-only); PostToolUse on Edit|Write|NotebookEdit — chain-state validator (warn-only). All follow ADR-0003: warn-or-block only, multi-harness aware, stateless; context surfaces via hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext. Honor HABEEBS_DISABLE_HOOKS=1 for emergency disable; HABEEBS_SKIP=<hook> for per-invocation skip.
